term: It Doesn T Happen To Every Guy
englishDefinitions: Used to say that a particular experience is not something every man has.
Used to suggest that something is unusual or not typical for most men.
persianTranslation: این تجربه برای همه پیش نمی‌آید
این برای هر کسی معمول نیست
examples: Winning a prize like that doesn't happen to every guy.
Getting noticed by a movie director doesn't happen to every guy.
He smiled and said, 'It doesn't happen to every guy.'
